jqJigsawPuzzle topology adapter

The piece-topology algorithm in jqJigsawPuzzle-adapted.js is derived from
jqJigsawPuzzle by JFMDev (Copyright 2012 JFMDev).

Original project: https://github.com/jfmdev/jqJigsawPuzzle
License: Mozilla Public License 2.0
License text: https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/

The modern drag system, responsive 3D presentation, upload workflow, snapping,
timer, completion tracking, and all other Drift puzzle code are original work.
